properties.property: {"id":22,"name":"EV022 size(2,1)","x":22,"y":57,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":1,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["This event is size 2x1. It is 2 tiles wide and 1 tile tall. "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["An event\u0027s size can be set by adding \u0022size(x,y)\u0022 in the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["event\u0027s name, where x and y are numbers."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["The event\u0027s placed position determines the bottom "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["left tile occupied by the event in-game."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["There are a lot of reasons to change an event\u0027s size. "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Here, it is covering the whole width of the stairs with "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["just one event, rather than needing two events that "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["do the same thing."]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbBridgeOn"]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":28,"name":"EV028 size(1,4)","x":19,"y":49,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":1,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["This event is size 1x4. It is 1 tile wide and 4 tiles tall. "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["An event\u0027s size can be set by adding \u0022size(x,y)\u0022 in the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["event\u0027s name, where x and y are numbers."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["The event\u0027s placed position determines the bottom "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["left tile occupied by the event in-game."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["There are a lot of reasons to change an event\u0027s size. "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Here, it is covering the whole path with just one "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["event, rather than needing four events that do the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["same thing."]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbBridgeOff"]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}
